title: Economic Growth & Housing — Cardenas for Chicago

statements.summary: Supports expanding as-of-right housing near transit and commercial areas and using neighborhood typologies instead of one-size-fits-all zoning.
statements.quote: Expand as-of-right housing near CTA/Metra, bus corridors, and commercial districts

statements.summary: Supports using neighborhood typologies instead of one-size-fits-all zoning.
statements.quote: Use neighborhood typologies instead of one-size-fits-all zoning

statements.summary: Supports accelerating permitting with accountable timelines.
Supports prioritizing deeply affordable housing pipeline delivery.
statements.quote: Prioritize deeply affordable housing pipeline delivery

statements.summary: Supports expanding anti-displacement support including legal aid and rental help.
statements.quote: Expand anti-displacement support: legal aid, rental help, and preservation funds

statements.summary: Describes an integrated strategy that treats homelessness as part of the housing system.
statements.quote: Our strategy treats homelessness, affordability, preservation, and ownership as one integrated civic system — not separate silos.

statements.summary: Supports expanding starter-home production for working families and first-time buyers.
statements.quote: Expand starter-home production for working families and first-time buyers
